column1: # Edge-collision beep — matches the original 1-2-3 R3 behavior of
# emitting a terminal bell when the pointer can't move further in the
# requested direction. Counter is bumped once per clamped arrow press;
# a successful move does not bump. /Worksheet Global Default Other Beep
# Disable turns the beeper off, /Enable turns it back on.
# Top edge: up from row 1 clamps + beeps.
# Left edge: left from column A clamps + beeps.
# Back to A1 for the disable path.
# Disable via menu: /Worksheet Global Default Other Beep Disable.
# Edge presses with beep disabled don't bump the counter.
# Re-enable, confirm it wakes up again.
